articles.title: Stellantis CEO sees opportunity in growing partnerships, bringing China-branded vehicles to North America - CNBC
articles.description: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa said there could be an opportunity to bring Chinese-branded vehicles into Mexico and potentially Canada, but not the U.S.
articles.content: AUBURN HILLS, Mich. Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa said he believes there's opportunity to expand the automaker's partnerships in North America to fill plants and increase sales and potentially to pro… [+2519 chars]

articles.author: Sarah Jane Tribble
articles.title: 'We'll never know if he could have been saved.' The gaps in Trump's rural health fund - NPR
articles.description: Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.
articles.content:
WILLIAMSTON, N.C. Two years after her brother's death, Debra Pierce still wonders whether the 50-year-old would have survived his heart attack if her local hospital hadn't closed.
